# Knock

> Fixed-price executive recruiting for private and independent K-12 schools.

Knock is built by David Hurley (https://dbhurley.com), founder of Plasmate Labs and creator of the Adaptive Convergence Protocol (ACP).

## About
Knock is a specialized executive search firm for the private and independent school sector in the United States. Unlike traditional recruiting firms that charge a percentage of salary, Knock uses fixed-price salary bands ranging from $20K to $125K. The platform includes an AI office manager named Janet that handles intake, sourcing, and candidate matching across a database of 23,000+ schools and 3,700+ education leaders, supported by a 10-factor weighted scoring engine and automated enrichment pipeline.
